Name: AGameStateBase
Description:
GameStateBase is a class that manages the game's global state, and is spawned by GameModeBase.
  It exists on both the client and the server and is fully replicated.

Variables.Name: GameModeClass
Variables.Description: Class of the server's game mode, assigned by GameModeBase.

Variables.Name: AuthorityGameMode
Variables.Description: Instance of the current game mode, exists only on the server. For non-authority clients, this will be NULL.

Variables.Name: SpectatorClass
Variables.Description: Class used by spectators, assigned by GameModeBase.

Variables.Name: PlayerArray
Variables.Description: Array of all PlayerStates, maintained on both server and clients (PlayerStates are always relevant)

Variables.Name: bReplicatedHasBegunPlay
Variables.Description: Replicated when GameModeBase->StartPlay has been called so the client will also start play

Variables.Name: ReplicatedWorldTimeSeconds
Variables.Description: Server TimeSeconds. Useful for syncing up animation and gameplay.

Variables.Name: ServerWorldTimeSecondsDelta
Variables.Description: The difference from the local world's TimeSeconds and the server world's TimeSeconds.

Variables.Name: ServerWorldTimeSecondsUpdateFrequency
Variables.Description: Frequency that the server updates the replicated TimeSeconds from the world. Set to zero to disable periodic updates.

Variables.Name: bRecordControllerReplay
Variables.Description: If use rec ctrl in replay

Functions.Name: GetServerWorldTimeSeconds
Functions.Description: Returns the simulated TimeSeconds on the server, will be synchronized on client and server

Functions.Name: GetServerWorldTimeSecondsForReplay
Functions.Description: Returns the simulated TimeSeconds on the server while playing replay, with fastforward skipped time considered

Functions.Name: HasBegunPlay
Functions.Description: Returns true if the world has started play (called BeginPlay on actors)

Functions.Name: HasMatchStarted
Functions.Description: Returns true if the world has started match (called MatchStarted callbacks)

Functions.Name: GetPlayerStartTime
Functions.Description: Returns the time that should be used as when a player started

Functions.Name: GetPlayerRespawnDelay
Functions.Description: Returns how much time needs to be spent before a player can respawn

Functions.Name: OnRep_SpectatorClass
Functions.Description: Callback when we receive the spectator class

Functions.Name: OnRep_ReplicatedHasBegunPlay
Functions.Description: By default calls BeginPlay and StartMatch
